'''Laseema''' was a blue skinned, possibly [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]], [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who worked for [[Qibbu]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], as a waitress in [[Qibbu's Hut/Legends|Qibbu's Hut]].

==Biography==
She was at first scared when [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]], [[Omega Squad]] and [[Ordo Skirata|Ordo]] came to the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. Soon though, she took an interest in [[Atin Skirata|Atin]]. It is not known for certain if she continued working in Qibbu's Hut but it seems likely that, after [[Kal Skirata]] rented her an [[Laseema's apartment|apartment]], she would have left her old job. During this time she was still very wary of unexpected visitors, prompting Kal to advise [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Bardan Jusik]] to call ahead before arriving.

When Jedi Knight [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] gave birth to [[Venku Skirata]], she acted as the baby's caretaker along with [[Besany Wennen]] and Jusik. She quit her job at Qibbu's and worked as a waitress in the [[Kragget/Legends|Kragget]], the cantina located below her apartment. Though in no need of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], she insisted on earning her keep.

During the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]], she married Atin via [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. After the battle she along with Kal's [[Clan Skirata|clan]] moved to Kal's home in [[Kyrimorut/Legends|Kyrimorut]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]], where she attended Etain's [[Funeral of Etain Tur-Mukan|funeral]]. Being a waitress, and the only one with experience in preparing food, Laseema took charge of the clan's kitchen, taking on the major task of feeding at least twenty individuals at a time.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''
*''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]''
